mainPage.description: Quest Builder is a website where you can create your own interactive stories. Build quests, design different choices, visualize the story flow on a graph, play through your own story, and share it with your friends

dashboard.title: This is your quests page
dashboard.emptyQuests: You do not have any quests yet. Create your first quest to start.

guide.title: Welcome!
guide.p1: You are in my quest editor. Here I will explain how to use the website.
guide.p2: First, create a quest: click the "Create quest" button and enter a title and description. After that, your quest card will appear on the quests page.
guide.p3: To start editing, click the quest card itself. You will get to the editor page with the graph: the graph is on the left, and the fields and buttons for adding nodes are on the right.
guide.p4: Create your first node: enter its title and description. The title will be shown as a choice option, and the description will be shown as the story text.
guide.p5: The idea is simple: the title describes the player's action, while the description explains what happens after that action.
guide.p6: You can use hotkeys in the editor. To delete a node or an edge, first select an element on the graph, then press Backspace or Delete.
guide.p7: If you need to select several elements at once, hold Shift and drag an area with the mouse. All nodes and edges inside the frame will be selected.
guide.p8: You can also select multiple elements one by one: hold Ctrl on Windows/Linux or Cmd on macOS and click the nodes or edges you need.
guide.p9: To work more comfortably with a large graph, move nodes with the mouse, connect edges between handles, and use graph zooming.
